markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, article feedback, and new campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Article Revisions:** Three articles require substantial structural revisions to correct conceptual errors (e.g., confusing tailgating with false positives) before resubmission for review.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Competitive Content:** Prioritized comparison pages will target direct competitors (Vault.ai, Spot.ai) first, as they are more relevant to sales conversations than hardware-focused firms like Verkada.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [**New Campaign:** A major campaign will launch to establish "Agentic Physical Security" as a new category, requiring a content cluster of anchor pieces, vertical-specific articles, and refreshed existing content.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [**Product Branding:** The new LLM, "Ambient Pulsar," must be used when discussing Ambient's specific product capabilities, not as a generic term for vision language models.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)

## Topics

### Article Feedback & Revisions

  - [**Status:** 3 articles sent for publishing; 9 pending review.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Revisions are required for 3–4 articles with substantial structural issues, not minor edits.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Key Conceptual Error:** Confusing tailgating with false positives.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Tailgating:** A threat Ambient uniquely recognizes, which other systems are blind to. It does not generate false positives.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [**False Positives:** Alerts from minor events (e.g., door left open) that require adjudication.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Action:** Mariana will create writing guidelines from this distinction to prevent future errors.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [**Correction:** The acronym "PAX" in the "Hidden Costs of PAX" blog title must be capitalized correctly (Physical Access Control Systems).](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### New Content Strategy & Prioritization

  - [**New Ideas:** Proposed topics (e.g., Generative AI Security, Real-time Camera Diagnosis) are approved for review in ContentOS.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Competitive Comparison Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To provide sales enablement and capture bottom-of-funnel traffic from prospects actively comparing solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** Target direct software competitors first, as they are more relevant to sales conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
        1.  [Vault.ai](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
        2.  [Spot.ai](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
        3.  [Skil](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
        4.  [Verkada](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
        5.  [Dragon](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
        6.  [Lumana](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Future Focus:** Create pages for VMS partners (e.g., Genetec, Milestone) to show how Ambient enhances their platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)

### New Campaign: Agentic Physical Security

  - [**Goal:** Establish "Agentic Physical Security" as a new industry category.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Build a content cluster around the term, as it has zero current search volume.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**Anchor Pieces:** Core articles defining the category.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
      - [**Vertical-Specific Content:** "Agentic Physical Security for Healthcare."](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
      - [**Process-Oriented Content:** Articles on the 5 stages of agentic security.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [**Content Refresh:** Update relevant existing articles with the new terminology to avoid cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [**Support:** Boardroom will share a messaging document with Mariana to guide content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)

### Product Branding: Ambient Pulsar

  - [**Hierarchy:** Ambient Platform → Ambient Intelligence (AI stack) → Ambient Pulsar (LLM).](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1935.0)
  - [**Usage:** Use "Ambient Pulsar" when discussing Ambient's specific product capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
  - [**Avoid:** Do not use it as a generic term for vision language models.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mariana:**](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [Revise 3–4 articles per feedback; resubmit for review.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [Correct "PAX" capitalization in blog title and image.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Create writing guidelines on tailgating vs. false positives.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Add new content ideas to ContentOS for review.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
      - [Research and share a list of top VMS brands.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1482.0)
  - [**Boardroom:**](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
      - [Share the "Agentic Physical Security" messaging document with Mariana.](https://fathom.video/share/43LyoxpGxbzszVQgts7s4YxvuoMSFsH2?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)
